title: ModuleRegistration
description: Every module emits this on load. The Conductor maintains a registry of all loaded modules. Missing modules degrade gracefully — the Conductor announces 'capability X unavailable' rather than crashing.

module_type.description: engine = math; renderer = pixels; core = hub infrastructure; data_source = ingestion.

framework_version_compatibility.description: Which MPA framework versions this module supports, e.g. ['v9', 'v9.1'].

subscribes_to.description: Event types this module listens for on the bus.

publishes.description: Event types this module emits on the bus.

computational_profile.description: light < 50ms typical; medium < 500ms; heavy = use Web Worker.

requires_libraries.description: External libraries this module needs loaded (e.g. ['mathjs', 'plotly']).

status.description: stub = placeholder file, not implemented. active = ready. deprecated = will be removed.

session_implemented_in.description: Which build session implemented this module. For audit trail of the project itself.
